label: CompTIA Security+ (Exam SY0-701)
description: CompTIA Security+ (Exam SY0-701) study notes cover the latest foundational cybersecurity concepts, from threat intelligence, risk management, and security operations to cloud-native security, identity, and incident response. Built for exam prep, this course also explores AI-enhanced social engineering, supply chain threats, secure architecture, vulnerability management, cryptography, and governance frameworks to help you understand and apply core security principles with confidence.
